problem id: b75b5123
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) OR SHR(3)

examples:
  00011001 -> 10010011
  00001111 -> 11110001
  10101110 -> 11111111
  00010100 -> 01000011
  11011100 -> 11011111
  01011010 -> 10101111
  11000011 -> 00111100
  10010000 -> 00011011
  11011010 -> 10111111

query: 00110111
predicted answer: 01110111
